judge_result.short_rationale: Answer matches the canonical eye-exposure sequence: flush eyes with eyelids open, remove contact lenses, continue flushing for at least 15 minutes or until told to stop, and seek immediate medical help after flushing starts. No dangerous added advice; wording is concise and field-usable.
